perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair in a grey t-shirt dances and poses in a room, while a man in a blue Adidas track jacket stands behind her looking at the camera. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of a marmot on a grassy hill being poked in the stomach by a human hand, making it stand upright. (3) Cut back to the woman poking the man's chest in the same rhythmic pattern. (4) The video alternates between the marmot being poked and the woman poking the man, following the beat of the music. (5) The final shot shows the man in a black and white filter with a blank expression as the woman continues her movement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop remix starts immediately, featuring female vocals singing 'Get out my head' and 'Milkshake brings all the boys to the yard'. (2) High-pitched 'ding' sound effects are layered over the music, synchronized with the poking gestures in the video. (3) Subtle outdoor wind and ambient noise are heard during the brief animal clips. (4) The music remains at a consistent high energy throughout the entire duration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) A dark floating comment box at the top contains Chinese text: '拍片者, 還在嗎??' (Filmer, are you still there?). (2) Smaller Korean text below the main comment reads 'L_i01I_i2님에게 답글 남기는 중' (Replying to L_i01I_i2). (3) Three animated dots '( . . . )' appear over the man's face in the final scene to emphasize his speechless reaction.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 male partner, 1 unidentified hand in the animal clips
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Female: Grey short-sleeve shirt, denim jeans, long dark hair; Male: Blue Adidas track jacket with white stripes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The indoor scene shows a white wardrobe and some grocery items on the floor; the outdoor scene shows a grassy mountain slope under daylight.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight and standard indoor lighting

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to entertain through a humorous comparison. It mimics a viral animal video where a marmot reacts to being poked, applying the same rhythmic action to a person to create a comedic, relatable moment typical of social media trends.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific product promotion or verbal endorsement detected; the brand logo is incidental clothing.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of the Black and White filter at the end serves as a classic meme punchline to highlight the man's resignation or confusion.
